cognitive.attention.baseline_substitute: Inline focus extraction inside deliberation or speaking without a shared focus artifact.
cognitive.attention.capability_metric: Downstream lobes receive a stable focus_artifact (primary + secondary + salience) that improves focus token overlap in delivery vs message-only extraction.
cognitive.attention.sunset_trigger: Sunset if A/B focus overlap on companion decision fixtures does not beat baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cognitive.deliberation.baseline_substitute: Single-shot model answer 'pick A or B' without inspectable alternatives or criteria.
cognitive.deliberation.capability_metric: Decision frames produce a structured decision_object with criteria_scores and commit_source, enabling deterministic replay on identical inputs.
cognitive.deliberation.sunset_trigger: Sunset if decision consistency and revisit rate on decision fixtures do not beat single-shot baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cognitive.execution.baseline_substitute: Speaking check overlap only, without bind/verify/recover/rollback ledger or rollback_policy.
cognitive.execution.capability_metric: Execution verifies planned action visibility in delivery with tiered recovery and safe rollback policy; yields measurable verification_status on every handoff.
cognitive.execution.sunset_trigger: Sunset if verification pass rate or recovery yield does not beat speaking-check-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cognitive.memory.baseline_substitute: Last-N message transcript pasted into context without encode/index/retrieve/forget stages.
cognitive.memory.capability_metric: Bounded episodic compression and semantic abstraction improve cue recall precision vs raw transcript replay under memory law limits.
cognitive.memory.sunset_trigger: Sunset if recall precision@k on companion fixture tasks does not beat transcript-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cognitive.planning.baseline_substitute: One-line next step inferred inline in reflection or speaking plan without step_chains.
cognitive.planning.capability_metric: Planning binds sequenced next_action and adaptive step chains from reflection/arc evidence, reducing unfocused multi-topic replies on companion arcs.
cognitive.planning.sunset_trigger: Sunset if companion arc task completion or focus adherence does not beat reflection-only next-step baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cognitive.reflection.baseline_substitute: Speaking check stage only, without cross-lobe expected_outcome comparison artifact.
cognitive.reflection.capability_metric: Reflection detects alignment gaps (partial/misaligned) and triggers planning handoff before delivery expansion on companion turns.
cognitive.reflection.sunset_trigger: Sunset if alignment gap detection rate or post-reply correction yield does not beat speaking-only check for three consecutive proof cycles.

jarvis.reasoning.baseline_substitute: Prompt-only routing where goal, route, evidence, and verification are implicit in model text.
jarvis.reasoning.capability_metric: High-impact tool/action paths require a complete OODA packet before execution; incomplete packets are blocked with inspectable reasons.
jarvis.reasoning.sunset_trigger: Never sunset; Jarvis retains constitutional executive authority.

speaking.runtime.baseline_substitute: Raw model completion text without stage trace or alignment check narration.
speaking.runtime.capability_metric: Every user-visible reply maps to named listen/frame/plan/speak/check stages with validate_reply() pass rate on governed companion turns.
speaking.runtime.sunset_trigger: Sunset if validate_reply pass rate on companion fixtures is not above Jarvis-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cortex.arcs.baseline_substitute: Session thread id plus last-N user/assistant messages without arc_id, goal_hierarchy, or closure state.
cortex.arcs.capability_metric: Goal-typed multi-turn arcs persist open threads, hierarchy closure, and prior execution context across companion turns within bounded turn_count.
cortex.arcs.sunset_trigger: Sunset if companion multi-turn task success does not beat message-window baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

cortex.tuning.baseline_substitute: Fixed execution_overlap_min and focus_overlap_min constants in execution verification.
cortex.tuning.capability_metric: Self-tuning adjusts bounded verification thresholds from execution/reflection evidence with drift guard and history; improves partial→pass conversion vs fixed thresholds.
cortex.tuning.sunset_trigger: Sunset if tuned thresholds do not improve verification outcomes vs fixed defaults for three consecutive proof cycles.

nova.intent.baseline_substitute: Planning next_action plus arc root_goal without enduring commitments or explicit tension poles consulted by other lobes.
nova.intent.capability_metric: Maintains active_commitments, protected_values, long_horizon_goals, and current_tensions across interruptions; commitments survive when narrative active_story changes.
nova.intent.sunset_trigger: Sunset if commitment survival across story-change fixtures does not beat planning-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

nova.narrative.baseline_substitute: Arc open_threads plus planning next_action plus memory cues without a narrative becoming/chapter/growth layer.
nova.narrative.capability_metric: Each turn updates active_story, becoming, working_on, open_threads, promises, and last_growth — giving meaning to memory, planning, and arc data without duplicating them.
nova.narrative.sunset_trigger: Sunset if operator-rated continuity on companion fixtures does not beat arc+planning-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

composition_rules.rule: Every composed turn records spine doctrine and precedence.
ARIS admission must pass before Nova Cortex executes.
Jarvis Core retains routing, state, and safety authority.
Companion turns may emit Speaking Runtime output when enabled.

invariants_v2_2.rule: Super Nova phase and activation gates must pass before composed turn runs.
A valid Super Nova activation token satisfies gate checks until watchdog revokes it.
Every Jarvis operator turn records Spine doctrine and ARIS admission even when cortex is off.
Operator cognitive turns default to fast path (reasoning + attention only) unless decision frame or full compose is requested.
ARIS non-copy admission must pass before Nova Cortex executes.
Jarvis Core retains routing, state, and safety authority on every composed turn.

spine.authority_rule: Nova may interpret; Jarvis must authorize.
spine.summary: Stability through defined law and bounded behavior precedes operator freedom through cognitive load reduction.

composed_spec.summary: Governed turn composition: AAIS Spine doctrine envelope, ARIS admission, Nova Face → Nova Cortex → Jarvis Core bridge.

composition_rules.rule: Jarvis Core routes; cognitive runtimes do not compete for control.
No user-visible output without Speaking Runtime when cognitive mode is active.
No high-impact action without Reasoning Runtime.
Deliberation Runtime activates only for decision frames.
Reflection hands off to Planning when alignment gaps or companion turns require sequenced next actions.
Planning hands off to Execution to bind, verify, and report the planned next action.
Goal-typed cortex arcs persist bounded turn history and open threads across companion turns.
Cortex adjusts bounded verification thresholds from execution and reflection evidence each turn.
Self-tuning keeps bounded invariant history and clamps cumulative drift.
Arc subgoals close on successful execution; parent goals close when children complete.
Every lobe declares capability_metric, baseline_substitute, and evidence_status; unproven lobes are sunset candidates.
Nova Narrative observes, synthesizes, and records continuity; it is not a second authority.
Nova Intent Core maintains commitments and tensions for lobes to consult; Jarvis remains executive.
All runtimes append to the shared cognitive ledger for the turn.

invariants.rule: Every output understandable on first read.
Any reply segment maps to a named ledger stage.
Every response serves the user's stated or inferred goal.
No hidden chain-of-thought; only inspectable stage records.
Narrative may describe becoming but may not redefine Nova's core identity.

family_spec.name: Nova Cortex

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Inline focus extraction inside deliberation or speaking without a shared focus artifact.
runtimes.capability_metric: Downstream lobes receive a stable focus_artifact (primary + secondary + salience) that improves focus token overlap in delivery vs message-only extraction.

invariants.rule: Hold at most three prioritized focus signals per turn.
Every focus signal maps to a ledger stage.

runtimes.summary: Select turn focus signals from message, Nova Face, memory, and frame context.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if A/B focus overlap on companion decision fixtures does not beat baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Single-shot model answer 'pick A or B' without inspectable alternatives or criteria.
runtimes.capability_metric: Decision frames produce a structured decision_object with criteria_scores and commit_source, enabling deterministic replay on identical inputs.

invariants.rule: Commit must follow enumerated options and tradeoffs.
Decision object must map to ledger stages.
Revisit opens only when new information is present.
Commit records explicit criteria_scores for every option.

runtimes.summary: Human-like decision loop with multi-criteria scoring and LLM fallback.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if decision consistency and revisit rate on decision fixtures do not beat single-shot baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Speaking check overlap only, without bind/verify/recover/rollback ledger or rollback_policy.
runtimes.capability_metric: Execution verifies planned action visibility in delivery with tiered recovery and safe rollback policy; yields measurable verification_status on every handoff.

invariants.rule: Execution binds only to an explicit planning next_action.
Execution reports outcomes; Jarvis retains authority for side effects.
Report follows verify stage in ledger order.
Rollback applies only after recovery attempt on failed verification.
Rollback skips partial passes, same targets, and capped repeat rollbacks.

runtimes.summary: Execute planned actions with tiered recovery and safe rollback policy.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if verification pass rate or recovery yield does not beat speaking-check-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Last-N message transcript pasted into context without encode/index/retrieve/forget stages.
runtimes.capability_metric: Bounded episodic compression and semantic abstraction improve cue recall precision vs raw transcript replay under memory law limits.

invariants.rule: Retrieve bounded cues only; no ungoverned writes.
Forget stage is advisory in v1; no destructive deletes.
Episodic turn records and semantic continuity cues are indexed separately.
Episodic records compress into bounded summaries; semantic cues abstract to stable facts.

runtimes.summary: Episodic compression and semantic abstraction within bounded memory law.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if recall precision@k on companion fixture tasks does not beat transcript-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: One-line next step inferred inline in reflection or speaking plan without step_chains.
runtimes.capability_metric: Planning binds sequenced next_action and adaptive step chains from reflection/arc evidence, reducing unfocused multi-topic replies on companion arcs.

invariants.rule: Plans contain at most five sequenced steps per chain.
Planning follows reflection; it does not bypass Jarvis authority.
At least one active step chain is bound per planning turn.
Active chain is scored from arc and tuning evidence.

runtimes.summary: Adaptive multi-step planning chains for reflection handoff and execution binding.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if companion arc task completion or focus adherence does not beat reflection-only next-step baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Speaking check stage only, without cross-lobe expected_outcome comparison artifact.
runtimes.capability_metric: Reflection detects alignment gaps (partial/misaligned) and triggers planning handoff before delivery expansion on companion turns.

invariants.rule: Reflection evaluates coherence; it does not override Jarvis authority.
Every alignment gap maps to a ledger stage.

runtimes.summary: Cross-lobe reflection loop with planning handoff.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if alignment gap detection rate or post-reply correction yield does not beat speaking-only check for three consecutive proof cycles.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Prompt-only routing where goal, route, evidence, and verification are implicit in model text.
runtimes.capability_metric: High-impact tool/action paths require a complete OODA packet before execution; incomplete packets are blocked with inspectable reasons.
runtimes.doctrine: Direct challenge overrides writing-domain drift. Jarvis answers as Jarvis first.

shape.message: Approval lifecycle could drift if state is split across two paths.

runtimes.summary: Bounded reasoning contract for operator-visible goals, route choice, workspace evidence, risks, action state, and verification targets.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Never sunset; Jarvis retains constitutional executive authority.

ul_substrate.doctrine: Nothing enters Jarvis raw. Everything passes through UL adaptation and the governed command substrate before execution.

runtimes.baseline_substitute: Raw model completion text without stage trace or alignment check narration.
runtimes.capability_metric: Every user-visible reply maps to named listen/frame/plan/speak/check stages with validate_reply() pass rate on governed companion turns.

invariants.rule: Every output must be understandable on first read.
The runtime can point to which step produced any part of the answer.
Every response must serve the user's stated or inferred goal.
Style can be warm or playful, but never at the cost of clarity.

spoken_forms.check: I've given you {delivered_summary}; if you want {next_options}, say so.
spoken_forms.frame: I'm treating this as a {frame_kind} request.
spoken_forms.listen: I'm first making sure I understand what you're asking.
spoken_forms.update: If this felt too abstract or too detailed, I'll tune the next pass.

runtimes.summary: Governed loop that names its stage, explains focus in natural language, delivers the answer, and checks alignment with the user's goal.
runtimes.sunset_trigger: Sunset if validate_reply pass rate on companion fixtures is not above Jarvis-only baseline for three consecutive proof cycles.
runtimes.system_prompt:
You are running the Speaking Runtime.
For every reply:

Say which stage you're in at least once: Listen, Frame, Plan, Speak, Check, or Update.

Make your reasoning legible in natural language, not as bullet-point "chain of thought,"
but as a human explanation of what you're focusing on and why.

Keep answers structured, minimal, and directly tied to the user's goal.

At the end, briefly check alignment: "Here's what I think I did for you; here's what you might want next."

family_spec.summary: Nova Cortex v3.0 — Persistent Narrative Continuity: cognition lobes plus observe-only narrative that maintains a journey across sessions.
